PythonDiscreteControl — Documentation
======================================

A Python project for the analysis, design, and simulation of discrete-time control
systems. The plant studied is the **ball-and-beam** modelled as a double integrator
:math:`H/s^2`. Two control strategies are compared: a **discrete PID controller**
and a **polynomial RST regulator**.

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 2
   :caption: Contents

   overview
   api/modules
